admin.settings.title: Site Settings
admin.settings.languages.front_desc: Choose languages enabled on the public site. The default language is the fallback when a visitor's browser language does not match an enabled language; it is also the fallback for copy and content. / negotiates by browser language first, and each language uses URLs such as /en/….
admin.settings.languages.custom_desc: Need another language? Add any locale here: code is used as the URL prefix, such as /pt/…, and tag is the BCP47 tag, such as pt-BR. Enable it above after adding. Custom front-end UI text falls back to the default language.
admin.settings.admin_i18n.title: Admin Interface Translation
admin.settings.admin_i18n.desc: The admin reads built-in JSON by default. Override keys for the current admin language here; missing keys or missing JSON fall back to Chinese.
